description:
## Component: hx-tooltip (NEW)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries**

Contextual help text appearing on hover/focus. Uses Floating UI for smart positioning.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)
Properties control content and positioning. Default slot wraps the trigger element.

### API Design
**Properties:** `content` (tooltip text), `placement` (top|right|bottom|left|auto), `delay` (ms before show), `disabled`
**Slots:** Default (trigger element)
**CSS Parts:** `tooltip`, `arrow`

### Drupal Integration
```twig
<hx-tooltip content="Medical Record Number — unique patient identifier">
  <abbr>MRN</abbr>
</hx-tooltip>

{# On icon buttons #}
<hx-tooltip content="Edit patient record">
  <hx-icon-button label="Edit"><hx-icon name="pencil"></hx-icon></hx-icon-button>
</hx-tooltip>
```

### Healthcare: Medical abbreviation explanations, field descriptions, action hints

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Smart positioning (flips when near viewport edge) via Floating UI/hx-popup
2. Shows on hover AND focus (accessibility)
3. Delay before showing (configurable)
4. WCAG 2.1 AA: tooltip role, aria-describedby on trigger
5. Escape key dismisses
6. Does NOT steal focus (informational only)
title: T1-22: hx-tooltip — Contextual Help Text

lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 5**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tooltip/hx-tooltip.styles.ts`:
- Around line 17-33: The stylesheet uses hardcoded literals (z-index 1000,
font-size 0.75rem, transition timing "150ms ease", pixel values like 4px/5px,
and hex color fallbacks) inside hx-tooltip styles; replace each literal with
corresponding design tokens (e.g. ensure --hx-tooltip-z-index,
--hx-tooltip-font-size, --hx-transition-fast, --hx-space-*,
--hx-border-radius-*, and color tokens like --hx-tooltip-bg / --hx-tooltip-color
are defined and used instead of numeric/hex literals), update any
component-level aliases for hx-tooltip to map to global --hx-* tokens, and
remove literal fallbacks so styling resolves exclusively through the --hx-*
tokens referenced in the existing declarations (keep the same property names:
z-index, max-width, padding, border-radius, background-color, color, font-size,
transition, etc.).

In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tooltip/hx-tooltip.test.ts`:
- Around line 396-420: The current test only verifies re-open suppression; add
an assertion for the immediate-close behavior when disabled while visible by
either extending the existing test or adding a new test (e.g., "disabling an
open tooltip hides it immediately") that: opens the HelixTooltip instance
(HelixTooltip) via focusin, awaits updateComplete, then sets el.disabled = true
while it's open, awaits updateComplete, and asserts the tooltip (shadowQuery(el,
'[part="tooltip"]')) is not visible (no 'tooltip--visible' class) and has
aria-hidden="true"; use the same event dispatch helpers (FocusEvent with
bubbles/composed) and updateComplete checks as in the surrounding tests so the
change is covered deterministically.

In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tooltip/hx-tooltip.ts`:
